title: Stash Internals, Partial Work, and Portable Patches
description: An urgent repair interrupts mixed staged, unstaged, untracked, and ignored experiments; some work must remain visible, some move across clones, and no secret may enter an object. Learners cumulatively produce work-in-progress preservation and transfer ledger through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Inspect stash commit structure, parents, refs, reflog, staged state, and untracked representation instead of treating a stash as an external bag.
Use pathspec, patch, staged, keep-index, include-untracked, and all controls while previewing secret and ignored-file consequences.
Choose apply, pop, branch, store, create, export, or import from collision risk, portability, and retention needs.
